author: yaye.work
description: Build mermaid flowcharts visually. Enuf said. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: yaye.work
manifest.description: Build mermaid flowcharts visually — drag blocks and connectors on a canvas, rename inline, and get live-generated mermaid code. Adds an editor to mermaid code blocks and a ribbon button.
manifest.name: Draw a Mermaid

name: Draw a Mermaid

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description: Maintenance release: resolves Obsidian community-review warnings (popout-window compatibility, async handling, lint cleanups). No user-facing behavior changes.

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description: First release of Draw a Mermaid — a visual builder for mermaid flowcharts in Obsidian. Drag blocks and connectors on a canvas, rename inline, multi-select for bulk edits, with live-generated mermaid code and preview.
